title: Dr. med. Christof Abächerli | Hirslanden-Gruppe
heading: Dr. med. Christof Abächerli

sections.heading: Dr. med. Christof Abächerli
sections.summary: Two-column hero: left column shows a back-link and the doctor portrait photo; right column shows the h1 name, a key-value DL listing specialty (Facharzt für) as a link to fachgebiet, and spoken languages. Layout class: grid-33-66.
Icon quick-action bar with a single CTA: 'E-Mail senden' (mailto link). Renders as a 3-column grid with icon + label per action. Additional CTAs (phone, appointment) would follow the same pattern.

50/50 two-column layout. Left column contains: Kontakt card (mobile-only), Kernkompetenzen, Werdegang, Schulen/Studium/Diplome. Right column contains: Kontakt card (desktop), Praktiziert bei, Mitglied- und Partnerschaften, Publikationen & Videos, Veranstaltungen & Vorträge.

sections.heading: Kontakt
sections.summary: Contact card with: practice name (ORTHO AARAU), clinic affiliation (Hirslanden Klinik Aarau), address (Schänisweg, 5001 Aarau), phone, email, website link, 'Arzt direkt' direct contact, opening hours (Mo–Fr 8:00–12:00 / 13:30–17:00). Shown in both left (mobile) and right (desktop) columns.

sections.heading: Kernkompetenzen
sections.summary: Free-text block with core competencies: Knie- und Hüftchirurgie, Sportverletzungen, detailed list of treatments for knee including conservative therapy, osteotomy, partial/total knee replacements, revision surgery.

sections.heading: Werdegang
sections.summary: Career history as a horizontal key-value DL (year range → position/institution). 8 entries spanning 2005–2019.

sections.heading: Schulen, Studium & Diplome
sections.summary: Education and qualifications as a horizontal key-value DL (year → qualification). 5 entries spanning 2004–2019, including FMH specialist title, sports medicine IOC diploma, DKG knee surgeon certification.

sections.heading: Praktiziert bei
sections.summary: Clinic affiliation list (UL). Single entry: Hirslanden Klinik Aarau with role label 'Partnerarzt' (tooltip: accredited specialist primarily working at this clinic).

sections.heading: Mitglied- und Partnerschaften
sections.summary: Unordered list of professional memberships: FMH, Swiss Orthopaedics, ESSKA, AGA, DKG, Aargauischer Ärzteverband, VSAO. 7 items.

sections.heading: Publikationen & Videos
sections.summary: Filtered list of publications/videos loaded via AJAX (data-url endpoint). Two YouTube video items shown: 'Behandlungsmethoden bei Arthrose an Knie, Hüfte und Schulter' (Sep 2020), 'Rapid Recovery: Schnelle Genesung nach Gelenkersatz' (May 2020). Each item has an icon, title h4, author name, date, and type badge.

sections.heading: Veranstaltungen & Vorträge
sections.summary: Events/talks list (empty for this doctor, but section always rendered). Loaded dynamically.

images.role: Doctor portrait photo, displayed in the left column of the lead section at full width of the column. Alt text is the filename (not descriptive).

ctas.text: Orthopädische Chirurgie und Traumatologie des Bewegungsapparates (Fachgebiet)
Behandlungsmethoden bei Arthrose an Knie, Hüfte und Schulter (Video)
Rapid Recovery: Schnelle Genesung nach Gelenkersatz (Video)

templateSpecificData.title: Dr. med.
templateSpecificData.specialty: Orthopädische Chirurgie und Traumatologie des Bewegungsapparates
templateSpecificData.openingHours: Montag bis Freitag, 8:00 bis 12:00 Uhr und 13:30 bis 17:00 Uhr. Sprechstunde nur auf Voranmeldung.

layoutNotes: ACTUAL PAGE FETCHED — localhost:3000 returned 404 for the given URL (AEM dev server not running for Hirslanden); data was fetched directly from https://www.hirslanden.ch. The doctor profile page uses a legacy AEM monolithic template (not EDS). Key layout observations: (1) Lead section uses a 33/66 grid with portrait left, name + specialty + languages right. (2) Below the lead is an icon quicklinks bar for contact actions. (3) The main body is a 50/50 two-column layout: left column holds mobile Kontakt + substantive content (Kernkompetenzen, Werdegang, Diplome); right column holds desktop Kontakt sidebar + affiliations + publications + events. (4) Responsive: Kontakt card is duplicated — shown in left column on mobile (show-on-small), hidden in right column on mobile (hide-on-small). (5) No appointment booking widget on this particular doctor page — only an email CTA in quicklinks. (6) Publications and events loaded asynchronously via data-url endpoints. (7) Doctor photo alt text is currently just the filename — accessibility issue to fix in EDS migration.
